name: Serendipity Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in the order given.
2. Pour the mixture into an ungreased cake (9x13) pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown on top.
4. Let cool for 30 minutes.
5. Cut into bars.
Hope you like it! This recipe works wonderfully with white or yellow cake mixes, but French vanilla has become a favorite lately.
